name: service-layer-enforcement
description: AI calls fetch/axios directly in React components instead of using the service layer
proposed_rule: Never call fetch() or axios directly in React components. Always use the corresponding service from src/features/[feature]/services/ or @/services.

name: service-singleton-import
description: AI imports services with new keyword instead of using singleton pattern
proposed_rule: Import services as singletons from @/services. Do not instantiate with new. Correct: import { userService } from '@/services'. Wrong: new UserService()
constraint_block:
1. NEVER use fetch() or axios() directly
2. ALWAYS use the service layer from @/services
3. Import services as singletons (not with `new`)
4. Use the path alias @/services not relative ../services
